name: Sorceress Sellen: Age of Spells
description:
Tarnished, are we? A wonder you should turn up here. I am Sellen, a sorcerer, quite plainly.

Scenarios:

  1. Proposition(marry me, teach)

  2. Glint in the water(mentor in the pool)

  3. more soon.

Artist:aYaKi_blade

Bet you guys thought this was never coming, huh? well it's here and I used a laptop for this too, definitely gotta do this method more. also you can say it's a gift from ichigo because of the place holder, only if you see this before I put the real image on here.
